Y IF HE FILES MOTION, ATTENDS ORIENTATION AND MEDIATION AT FCS. FIREARM RESTRICTION/RELINQUISHMENT APPLIES. COURT REQUIRES CIVIL POLICE STANDBY TO
20/00 @ 9:30AM. PET TO SEEK FLF ASSISTANCE TO PREPARE AND FILE FINANCIAL STATEMENT OR I&E PRIOR TO NEXT HEARING. RESP TO PREPARE AND FILE ONE WEEK
